name: BiH Ministry of Foreign Trade and Economic Relations

outreach.notes: Commissioner office for BiH's Expo 2027 section — contract signed 2-3 Jul 2026 (fresh!). Košarac frames the Expo as an economy-connecting opportunity — warm angle for the fact-check + exhibitor-pages email once a public email is found. Sources (B): tanjug.rs 263654, blic.rs.
